summary: Iteration 2 frontend-only Playwright testing of 4 UI improvements: (1) override price flow on /admin/products, (2) WhatsApp/Email share buttons on quotation detail, (3) responsive mobile sidebar with hamburger drawer, (4) public catalog grid visuals. All 4 features verified working end-to-end on the deployed preview URL.

feature_test_results.details: Initial ONCOST ₹1,250 → typed 999 in product-override-SG 501 and clicked product-save-SG 501 → ONCOST cell reloaded to ₹999. Then cleared input (empty string) and clicked Save → ONCOST reverted to rule-computed ₹1,250. Backend PUT /api/products/{id} now correctly accepts override_price: null to clear. SG 501 left in clean state (override_price=null).

On /admin/quotations/<id> (quotation ONC-202606-0004, customer 'Test Acme'): quote-copy-link, quote-share-whatsapp, quote-share-email all present and clickable. WhatsApp href starts with https://wa.me/?text=... and contains 'Test Acme' + 'ONC-202606-0004' + 'ONCOST'. Email href starts with mailto:?subject=...&body=... and includes both subject and body with customer name, quotation_id, total, share link, PDF link.

On viewport 390x800: data-testid='admin-mobile-menu' hamburger visible in header. Desktop sidebar (hidden lg:flex) hidden. Clicking hamburger opens overlay drawer with sidebar containing Products, Pricing Rules, New Quotation, Quotations, View Catalog (confirmed via screenshot). Close X button visible in drawer header.

92 product cards rendered with aspect-[4/3] containers (object-contain images), no SG cost / sg_price labels exposed publicly, only ONCOST prices shown (₹1,250 etc.). Layout is a clean responsive grid; no overlapping text or collisions observed. SG-prefixed product codes still appear as SKUs (SG 501, SG 502, …) which is consistent with iteration 1's note.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminLayout.jsx renders the same `sidebar` JSX inside BOTH the desktop <aside> and the mobile drawer — this duplicates all data-testid values (nav-products, nav-pricing, logout-btn, etc.) in the DOM at the same time on >=lg breakpoints when mobileOpen is true (rare) and on <lg only one is visible. Not a functional bug but it can confuse Playwright .locator() which may match the hidden desktop instance first. Consider keying the testids per-context or rendering only one tree at a time.
Save button enable-state logic in ProductsPage.jsx works correctly for clearing (empty string !== current override). Confirmed via UI test.
seed_data_creation: No new data created. SG 501 override_price was temporarily set to 999 then cleared back to null. No quotations created or modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 verified 4 UI improvements end-to-end. Override clear via empty-string-as-null works. WhatsApp/Email share buttons functional with proper encoded URLs. Mobile drawer works. Public catalog grid is clean. Note: data-testid lookup for sidebar nav items should use the constants from /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/oncost.js (e.g., 'nav-products' NOT 'admin-nav-products'). Existing quotations on the system: ONC-202606-0004 (Test Acme) and one other.
